failures.query: BBB CoreCap tubeless valve site:wiggle.com OR site:chainreactioncycles.com
BBB CoreCap tubeless valve price EUR buy
Schwalbe Clik valve price EUR buy
LME aluminum price USD per ton today

10.evidenceText: No price information found in the provided source content for either schwalbe.com or bike-discount.de
10.extractionRationale: The provided evidence from both sources does not contain any retail price information in EUR or other currencies. Source 1 is purely descriptive, and Source 2, while from a retailer (Bike-Discount), has no price data in the provided excerpt.

27.evidenceText: Five distinct product URLs identified: p1993548.html (80mm schwarz), p1993546.html (40mm schwarz), p1993547.html (60mm schwarz), p1993551.html (80mm Kupfer), p1993550.html (60mm Kupfer). All are CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 tubeless valve listings on Bike24 DE.
27.extractionRationale: Counted each unique product page URL as one distinct listing. The five sources provided represent five distinct URLs with different product variants (size and color combinations) for the BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166. No duplicates or accessories were counted.

30.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Tubeless Valve - Set of 2 - 60 mm | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: All 4 product listings reviewed contain only product descriptions without any stock status information (available/unavailable/out of stock)
30.extractionRationale: Stock status information is not present in any of the 4 provided product listing excerpts. The content appears to be truncated product descriptions that do not include availability or inventory details.

56.evidenceText: Distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik Valve (SCV) identified across sources: Nr. 3, 4, 6, 7, 10, 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, 19, 19-EL, 19L, 19L-EL. Conversion kits (SV-SCV, DV-SCV) and valve accessories excluded.

61.evidenceText: Three-month LME aluminum futures reached $3,571 per metric ton on April 13
61.extractionRationale: Extracted the LME aluminum price directly from Investing.com source which states three-month LME aluminum futures reached $3,571 per metric ton on April 13, 2026. Price is already in USD per metric ton format.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: The source states the current price as 1,793.99, which in commodity markets is typically quoted in cents per pound. Converting 1,793.99 cents/lb to USD/lb yields 17.94 USD/lb.
